mapper.sql: id, sys_no, biz_type, title, dept_id, record_type, journal, journal_name, scope_type, sub_user_id, sub_user_code, sub_user_name, sub_date, sub_time, data_status, check_status, operate_time, content, is_multi_contribution, is_keep_secret, proj_id, press, serial_no, thesis_type, language, contribute_date, class, discipline, research_field, pub_unit_name, all_code, first_author_id, first_author_name, first_author_code, first_author_dept_id, first_author_type, first_author_title, person_serialno, is_graduate, mentor1, is_in_two_years, mentor2, tfauthor, tfauthor_dept_id, corr_author_id, corr_author_name, corr_author_code, corr_author_type, corr_author_title, corr_author_dept_id, tcauthor, tcauthor_dept_id, is_contributed, reg_paper_id, is_reimburse, reimburse_way, project_code, awardee_type, awardee_account, awardee_id_no, awardee_bank, awardee_bank_account, awardee_contact_tel, file_ids, note, proj_author
mapper.select: select ply.id as rowId,ply.title as title,sj.code as "journal.id",sj.name as "journal.name",sj.name as journalName, csjt.code as "journalType.id",csjt.name as "journalType.name",csjt.name as journalTypeName, slanguage.code as "language.id",slanguage.name as "language.name",slanguage.name as languageName, fuser.id as "firstAuthor.id",fuser.name as "firstAuthor.name",fuser.name as firstAuthorName, cuser.id as "corrAuthor.id",cuser.name as "corrAuthor.name",cuser.name as corrAuthorName, fcspt.code as "firstAuthorType.id",fcspt.name as "firstAuthorType.name",fcspt.name as firstAuthorTypeName, ccspt.code as "corrAuthorType.id",ccspt.name as "corrAuthorType.name",ccspt.name as corrAuthorTypeName, fcsti.code as "firstAuthorPosition.id",fcsti.name as "firstAuthorPosition.name",fcsti.name as firstAuthorPositionName, ccsti.code as "corrAuthorPosition.id",ccsti.name as "corrAuthorPosition.name",ccsti.name as corrAuthorPositionName, fdept.id as "firstAuthorDept.id",fdept.name as "firstAuthorDept.name",fdept.name as firstAuthorDeptName, cdept.id as "corrAuthorDept.id",cdept.name as "corrAuthorDept.name",cdept.name as corrAuthorDeptName, ply.is_reimburse as jackFreeFlag,ply.serial_no as seriousNo,ply.contribute_date as sendDate, ply.project_code as projNo, csrw.code as "reimburseWay.id",csrw.name as "reimburseWay.name",csrw.name as reimburseWayName, puser.id as "leadUser.id",puser.name as "leadUser.name",puser.name as leadUserName, ply.awardee_type as encouragetype,ply.awardee_account as personCode, ply.awardee_id_no as personIdentify,ply.awardee_contact_tel as personTel, ply.awardee_bank as personBankNo,ply.awardee_bank_account as personBankAccount, ply.note as remark,ply.data_status as dataStatus from srm_paper_submission_apply ply left join srm_journal sj on sj.code=ply.journal left join ct_srm_journal_type csjt on csjt.code=ply.record_type left join ct_srm_reimbursement_way csrw on csrw.code=ply.reimburse_way left join ct_srm_language slanguage on slanguage.code=ply.language left join ct_srm_user fuser on fuser.id=ply.first_author_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=ply.corr_author_id left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=ply.proj_author left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=ply.first_author_dept_id left join ct_srm_dept cdept on cdept.id=ply.corr_author_dept_id left join ct_srm_person_type fcspt on fcspt.code=ply.first_author_type left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=ply.corr_author_type left join ct_srm_title_info fcsti on fcsti.code=ply.first_author_title left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=ply.corr_author_title where ply.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_paper_submission_apply
data_status = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
serial_no = #{serialNo},
sub_date = #{subDate},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
where id=#{rowId}
